deploy:app.cmd: fastlane {{platform=[ios, android]}} {{env=[dev, staging, prod]}} --track={{track=[alpha, beta, production]}}
deploy:app.desc: Deploy an app build with fastlane (platform/env/track)

download_apk2.cmd: echo 'bundle exec fastlane android download_universal_apk is_canary:{{is_canary=[true,false]}} version_code:{{version_code}} destination:build/{{version_code}}.apk'
download_apk2.desc: Demo of fastlane APK download with variables
